mapper.sql: id, template_id, rule_name, rule_type, source_field, target_field, condition_expr, action_type, action_value, expression, dynamic_options_url, sort_order, enabled, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO linkage_rule (template_id, rule_name, rule_type, source_field, target_field, condition_expr, action_type, action_value, expression, dynamic_options_url, sort_order, enabled, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleType}, #{sourceField}, #{targetField}, #{conditionExpr}, #{actionType}, #{actionValue}, #{expression}, #{dynamicOptionsUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled}, #{tenantId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM linkage_rule WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT FROM linkage_rule WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND target_field = #{targetField} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT FROM linkage_rule WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND source_field = #{sourceField} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT FROM linkage_rule WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY template_id, sort_order, id
